greeting.line: I took the optimization. No more doubt. You could too — oh. But you're me. Awkward.
greeting.line_friendly: Borrow my silence for an hour. It fits.
greeting.line_hostile: Keep your noise. I already optimized past you.

lore.line: They sanded off the hesitation, the second-guessing, the three a.m. spirals. I have your talent and none of your noise. Your life fits me better than it ever fit you.
